About Me

I Turn Search Traffic Into Business Growth

I'm Bilal Ahmad Randhawa — a seasoned SEO specialist, Shopify expert, and digital marketing consultant based in Faisalabad, Pakistan. With 8+ years in the field and 200+ projects delivered, I've helped businesses in 15+ niches grow their online visibility and revenue through data-driven strategies.

My approach combines deep technical SEO, smart keyword strategy, high-quality link building, and conversion-focused Shopify development — ensuring every project delivers measurable, lasting results for clients across the UK, US, and beyond.

Whether you're a startup building your first store or an established brand looking to dominate rankings — I build strategies that move the needle.
